items.name: Shoulder Shark Cat
items.description: Jaws with paws.

items.name: Shoulder Crow
items.description: What a weird pet you have.  I don't think I'd want a crow that close to my eyes...but you know ... that's just me.

items.name: Cool Crab Shoulder Friend
items.description: He's just here for a good time, don't make him crabby.

items.name: Shoulder Wolf
items.description: No need to be a one man wolf pack with him hanging around. He does look hungry though...

items.name: Turtle Shoulder Friend
items.description: I'm not sure how that turtle got all the way to your shoulder without you knowing, but now that he's there, he's there to stay.

items.name: Macaw Shoulder Friend
items.description: "The boys in the back are called macaws Because of their claws? No, because they’re macaws!"

items.name: SHOULDER: Tiny Top Hat
items.description: This hat only fits the Shoulder Sloth or Shoulder Bear. It does not fit regular heads. Even animals need to put on the ritz sometimes.

items.name: Korblox Shoulder Pauldrons
items.description: Mean and bad as the day is long, the Korblox warriors are constantly inventing new ways to punish their foes. This armor reflects these sensibilities.

items.name: Gingerbread Headrow
items.description: I'd nom them before they nom you!  This item came out of the double double gift of trouble on December 18th, 2013.

items.name: Shoulder Elf
items.description: He sees you when you're sleeping - he knows when you're awake. And he tells Santa everything.

items.name: Raincoat Duck Shoulder Friend
items.description: These April showers won't dampen their spirits, since they know it leads to May flowers!

items.name: Miniature Shoulder Reindeer
items.description: Miniature sled not included.

items.name: Shoulder Hanging Unicorn
items.description: Having a fabulous beast around can really brighten up your day.

items.name: Penguin Shoulder Friend
items.description: It's a little bit cold for ice cream. However, a good friend is always ready to share!

items.name: Iguana Shoulder Friend
items.description: Iguana have a good time.

items.name: Inflatable Flamingo Shoulder Hanger
items.description: This flamingo is pumped to be here.

items.name: Fireball Pet
items.description: Bring the heat in World // Zero with this powerful companion!

items.name: Shoulder T-Rex
items.description: Don’t worry, he’s pretty much harmless...pretty much...

items.name: Kunai Kitten Shoulder Friend
items.description: Cats are a ninja's best friend. Sometimes...

items.name: Bunny Shoulder Friend
items.description: Sometimes it feels like you don't carrot all!

items.name: Magic Wizard Owl
items.description: Why are owls magical - hoo knows? Hoo hoo.

items.name: KoSS Companion Bird
items.description: Your loyal bird will sit on your shoulder, just waiting to be of service.

items.name: Gucci Glam Rock Shoulder Pads x Achille Lauro 3.0
items.description: Shoulder pads detailed with interlocking G that were worn by Achille Lauro on stage during the first night of Sanremo 2021 as the artist paid homage to the cult of Glam Rock with a performance of his song "Siamo soli." Item creation supervised by Rook Vanguard. This is a collectible item. Item created for 3.0 avatars woman/man.

items.name: Tropical Holiday Shoulder Bird
items.description: Mele Kalikimaka is the thing to say on a bright, Hawaiian, Christmas day!

items.name: Raven Shoulder Familiar
items.description: Ravens are long time companions to witches, warlocks, and people named Poe.

items.name: Rodeo Shoulder Pads - Lil Nas X (LNX)
items.description: I can take it all back, I never cared 'bout what you thought.

items.name: Red Panda Shoulder Buddy
items.description: If he's so red, whats he so mad about? Looks pretty happy to me!

items.name: Teacher's Pet Shoulder Friend
items.description: I really need the extra credit, this semester looks ruff.

items.name: Sleepy Penguin Friend
items.description: Just five more minutes...

items.name: Shoulder Spring Duckie
items.description: Any Egg Hunt eggs no one finds? This is what happens to them.
